title: Jennie And Tame Impala’s “Dracula” Jumps To New Peak On Billboard Radio Songs Chart
content:
BLACKPINK’s Jennie and Tame Impala’s hit remix of “Dracula” continues its steady climb on U.S. radio! This week, Jennie and Tame Impala’s collab version of “Dracula” soared to a new all-time high of No. 6 on Billboard’s Radio Songs chart, which measures weekly plays on U.S. radio stations across all genres. The new peak marks… Continue reading Jennie And Tame Impala’s “Dracula” Jumps To New Peak On Billboard Radio Songs Chart
The post Jennie And Tame Impala’s “Dracula” Jumps To New Peak On Billboard Radio Songs Chart appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: JENNIE与Tame Impala合作曲《Dracula》升至Billboard电台榜第6位
facts_list: 本周，BLACKPINK成员JENNIE与Tame Impala合作的《Dracula》混音版在Billboard电台歌曲榜（Radio Songs chart）升至第6位，创下新高
该榜单统计美国各类型电台的周播放量
summary_zh: BLACKPINK成员JENNIE与Tame Impala合作的《Dracula》混音版在美国Billboard电台歌曲榜（Radio Songs chart）上攀升至第6位，创下该曲在榜单上的最高排名。该榜单统计美国各类型电台的周播放量。

title: BTS Sets UK Record As “SWIM” Becomes Their 13th Single To Be Certified BRIT Silver
content:
BTS’s “SWIM” has gone silver in the United Kingdom! The British Phonographic Industry (BPI) has officially awarded BTS’s latest title track “SWIM” a silver BRIT certification, making it their 13th song to achieve the feat. BTS is now the first Korean artist ever to have 13 different singles certified silver in the United Kingdom. The… Continue reading BTS Sets UK Record As “SWIM” Becomes Their 13th Single To Be Certified BRIT Silver
The post BTS Sets UK Record As “SWIM” Becomes Their 13th Single To Be Certified BRIT Silver appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: BTS《SWIM》获英国银唱片认证，创韩流歌手13首单曲纪录
facts_list: 英国唱片业协会（BPI）正式授予BTS最新主打曲《SWIM》BRIT银唱片认证
这是BTS第13首获得英国银唱片认证的单曲
BTS成为首位在英国拥有13首不同单曲获银唱片认证的韩国艺人
summary_zh: BTS的歌曲《SWIM》在英国获得BRIT银唱片认证，这是他们第13首达成此成就的单曲，使BTS成为首位在英国拥有13首不同单曲获银唱片认证的韩国艺人。

title: “Agent Kim Reactivated” Ratings Break 15 Percent In 2 Episodes, Making It Fastest Drama In 5 Years To Do So
content:
SBS’s “Agent Kim Reactivated” is gaining steam at breakneck speed! After kicking off on the highest premiere ratings of any miniseries in 2026, the new revenge drama starring So Ji Sub continued to soar to new heights with its second episode, which was the most-watched show of any kind to air on June 27. According… Continue reading “Agent Kim Reactivated” Ratings Break 15 Percent In 2 Episodes, Making It Fastest Drama In 5 Years To Do So
The post “Agent Kim Reactivated” Ratings Break 15 Percent In 2 Episodes, Making It Fastest Drama In 5 Years To Do So appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 《金科长重启》两集收视破15%，创5年来最快纪录
facts_list: SBS《金科长重启》第2集于6月27日播出，成为当日所有节目收视冠军
该剧仅用2集收视率突破15%，是5年来最快达成此成绩的韩剧
该剧首播收视率创下2026年迷你剧最高开播纪录
summary_zh: SBS复仇剧《金科长重启》（暂译）由苏志燮主演，开播即创下2026年迷你剧最高首播收视率。第2集于6月27日播出，成为当日所有节目收视冠军，并仅用2集收视率突破15%，创下5年来最快达成此成绩的韩剧纪录。

title: June Rising Singer Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
content:
The Korean Business Research Institute has revealed this month’s brand reputation rankings for rising singers! The rankings were determined through an analysis of various rising singers’ media coverage, consumer participation, interaction, and community awareness indexes, using big data collected from May 26 to June 26. RESCENE shot to the top of this month’s list with… Continue reading June Rising Singer Brand Reputation Rankings Announced
The post June Rising Singer Brand Reputation Rankings Announced appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 6月新锐歌手品牌声誉榜出炉，RESCENE登顶
facts_list: 韩国企业评价研究所于5月26日至6月26日收集大数据，分析新锐歌手的媒体曝光、消费者参与、互动及社区认知指数，发布6月品牌声誉排名
RESCENE位列本月榜单第一
summary_zh: 韩国企业评价研究所公布6月新锐歌手品牌声誉排名，基于5月26日至6月26日的大数据分析媒体曝光、消费者参与、互动及社区认知指数，RESCENE夺得榜首。

title: Jang Ki Ha And Yoon Ga Yi Confirmed To Be Dating
content:
It’s official: Jang Ki Ha and Yoon Ga Yi are in a relationship! On June 27, both stars’ agencies officially confirmed reports that they were dating. Jang Ki Ha’s agency DooRooDooRoo Artist Company stated, “The two of them are seeing one another with positive feelings,” while Yoon Ga Yi’s agency OUI Entertainment similarly confirmed, “It’s… Continue reading Jang Ki Ha And Yoon Ga Yi Confirmed To Be Dating
The post Jang Ki Ha And Yoon Ga Yi Confirmed To Be Dating appeared first on Soompi.
title_zh: 张基河与尹加伊恋情公开，双方经纪公司确认
facts_list: 6月27日，张基河所属社DooRooDooRoo Artist Company和尹加伊所属社OUI Entertainment分别发表声明，确认两人正在交往。
张基河所属社表示两人以积极的心态交往，尹加伊所属社同样确认了恋情。
summary_zh: 6月27日，歌手张基河与尹加伊的恋情得到双方经纪公司正式确认。张基河所属社DooRooDooRoo Artist Company称两人以积极心态交往，尹加伊所属社OUI Entertainment也确认了该消息。

content:

title: Watch: I.O.I Takes 2nd Win For “Suddenly” On “Music Core”; Performances By Hearts2Hearts, EVAN, And More
content:
I.O.I has won a second music show trophy for their latest hit “Suddenly”! On the June 27 episode of MBC’s “Music Core,” the candidates for first place were RIIZE’s “Do your dance,” I.O.I’s “Suddenly,” and ILLIT’s “It’s Me.” I.O.I ultimately took the win with a total of 6,637 points. Congratulations to I.O.I! Watch a clip… Continue reading Watch: I.O.I Takes 2nd Win For “Suddenly” On “Music Core”; Performances By Hearts2Hearts, EVAN, And More
The post Watch: I.O.I Takes 2nd Win For “Suddenly” On “Music Core”; Performances By Hearts2Hearts, EVAN, And More appeared first on Soompi.
facts_list: I.O.I在6月27日MBC《音乐中心》中以《Suddenly》获得一位
候补包括RIIZE《Do your dance》、I.O.I《Suddenly》、ILLIT《It's Me》
I.O.I最终以6,637分获胜
该期节目还有Hearts2Hearts、EVAN等表演
summary_zh: I.O.I凭借《Suddenly》在6月27日MBC《音乐中心》中获得第二座音乐节目奖杯，以6,637分击败RIIZE和ILLIT。本期节目还包含Hearts2Hearts、EVAN等艺人的表演。

title: She Co-Wrote Kpop Demon Hunters While Quietly Coming Out as Bisexual. The Story She Was Telling Kept Turning into Her Own - Thought Catalog
content: She Co-Wrote Kpop Demon Hunters While Quietly Coming Out as Bisexual. The Story She Was Telling Kept Turning into Her Own Thought Catalog
title_zh: 她合写K-pop恶魔猎人漫画时悄然出柜双性恋，故事逐渐变成自传
facts_list: 一位女性创作者在合写K-pop题材恶魔猎人漫画期间，悄然向亲友出柜为双性恋
该漫画的创作过程逐渐反映其个人经历，故事走向与自身身份认同产生共鸣
summary_zh: 一位女性创作者在参与合写一部K-pop题材的恶魔猎人漫画时，悄然向身边人出柜为双性恋。她发现自己在创作过程中，故事的情节和主题逐渐与个人经历重合，最终成为自我探索的映射。该报道来自Thought Catalog，聚焦创作与身份认同的交织。
